title: Tired of your musty smelling closet? Here’s a quick hack
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAROO NEWS - Picture yourself walking towards your wardrobe after spending several hours brainstorming, trying to figure out what the ideal outfit for that special event may be.","html":"KAROO NEWS - Picture yourself walking towards your wardrobe after spending several hours brainstorming, trying to figure out what the ideal outfit for that special event may be."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"You finally get to your closet and as you open it and reach for that section of the clothes placed right towards the end of your wardrobe, you are met by a musty smell."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This unpleasant smell is not only clung onto your closet but it is stuck onto your clothes too.","html":"This unpleasant smell is not only clung onto your closet but it is stuck onto your clothes too."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While finding the source of this musty and unpleasant smell can be difficult, do not assume the worst.","html":"While finding the source of this musty and unpleasant smell can be difficult, do not assume the worst."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The source of such smells often stems from a buildup of dust and sweat-soaked clothes, with the worst case often being a nearby water leak.","html":"The source of such smells often stems from a buildup of dust and sweat-soaked clothes, with the worst case often being a nearby water leak."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When moisture becomes enclosed in small spaces then it may result in an unpleasant odour.","html":"When moisture becomes enclosed in small spaces then it may result in an unpleasant odour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Service Master Restore – a company that offers commercial disaster restoration services – states,","html":"Service Master Restore – a company that offers commercial disaster restoration services – states,"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“To identify the source of this moisture, look for any water leaks around walls and ceilings. If the closet is often humid due to its location beside a bathroom or your basement, investing in a dehumidifier may help improve airflow and reduce the odour.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A frequent mistake that many make is not allowing fresh air to enter into their closets. While our closets are constantly kept closed, this may cause the stuffy and smelly air to circulate the entire wardrobe and cling onto your clothes.","html":"A frequent mistake that many make is not allowing fresh air to enter into their closets. While our closets are constantly kept closed, this may cause the stuffy and smelly air to circulate the entire wardrobe and cling onto your clothes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To break the poor ventilation cycle be sure to regularly open your wardrobe. According to Innovative Home Storage – a manufacturer of custom closet systems and home organization systems – they advise you to, “Open windows to allow fresh air to come inside. Also, avoid packing clothes tightly together on hangers. This will not allow for proper airflow between them and can cause an unpleasant odour.”","html":"To break the poor ventilation cycle be sure to regularly open your wardrobe. According to Innovative Home Storage – a manufacturer of custom closet systems and home organization systems – they advise you to, “Open windows to allow fresh air to come inside. Also, avoid packing clothes tightly together on hangers. This will not allow for proper airflow between them and can cause an unpleasant odour.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After instilling the habit of frequently leaving your closet open to remove the stench, try this quick and easy hack:","html":"After instilling the habit of frequently leaving your closet open to remove the stench, try this quick and easy hack:"},{"type":"list","items":["Take several pantyliners and stick them in different areas of your closet.","After sticking them, spray a generous amount of your fragrance onto them and allow your clothes and closet to smell good.","Say goodbye to the stench."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on Caxton publication, Alberton Record","html":"Read more on Caxton publication, Alberton Record"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Tired of your musty smelling closet? Here’s a quick hack
